allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.get\('scripts',{}\).items\(\) if any\(x in k.lower\(\) for x in ['migrate','prisma','db','push','generate']\)]")
